simple_types.name: Array_Component_Order
simple_types.code: type Array_Component_Order is (None, RGB, RGBA, ARGB, BGR, BGRA, ABGR);

simple_types.name: Bitmap_Pixel_Order
simple_types.code:
type Bitmap_Pixel_Order is (None, Little_Endian, Big_Endian) with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Bits_Per_Pixels
Bytes_Per_Pixels
simple_types.code:
type Bytes_Per_Pixels is range 0 .. 4 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Colour_Mask
simple_types.code:
type Colour_Mask is mod 2 ** 32 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Gamma_Value
simple_types.code:
type Gamma_Value is mod 2 ** 16 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Index_Order_Padding
simple_types.code:
type Index_Order_Padding is range 0 .. 1 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Non_Planar_Pixel_Padding
simple_types.code:
type Non_Planar_Pixel_Padding is range 0 .. 7 with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Packed_Component_Layout
simple_types.code:
type Packed_Component_Layout is
  (None,
   Bits_332,
   Bits_4444,
   Bits_1555,
   Bits_5551,
   Bits_565,
   Bits_8888,
   Bits_2101010,
   Bits_1010102) with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Packed_Component_Order
simple_types.code:
type Packed_Component_Order is
  (None,
   XRGB,
   RGBX,
   ARGB,
   RGBA,
   XBGR,
   BGRX,
   ABGR,
   BGRA) with
  Convention => C;

simple_types.name: Pixel_Types
simple_types.code:
type Pixel_Types is
  (Unknown,
   Index_1,
   Index_4,
   Index_8,
   Packed_8,
   Packed_16,
   Packed_32,
   Array_U8,
   …,
   Array_F32) with
  Convention => C;

array_types.name: Gamma_Ramp
array_types.code:
type Gamma_Ramp is array (Integer range 1 .. 256) of Gamma_Value with
  Convention => C;

record_types.name: Non_Planar_Pixels
Pixel_Format

type Pixel_Format_Access is access all Pixel_Format with

constants.name: Pixel_Format_ABGR_1555
constants.code:
Pixel_Format_ABGR_1555 : constant Pixel_Format_Names :=
  Pixel_Format_Names'(Planar            => False,
                      Non_Planar_Format => Non_Planar_Pixels'
                        (Padding         => Non_Planar_Pixel_Padding'First,
                         Flag            => True,
                         Pixel_Type      => Packed_16,
                         Pixel_Order     => Pixel_Orders'
                           (Pixel_Type   => Packed_16,
                            Packed_Order => ABGR),
                         Layout          => Bits_1555,
                         Bits_Per_Pixel  => 16,
                         Bytes_Per_Pixel => 2));
